testcase.name: test_add_items_to_existing_order_and_send
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_send_kitchen_first_exit.py:234: in test_add_items_to_existing_order_and_send assert update_response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to update order: {update_response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to update order: {"detail":"Method Not Allowed"} E assert 405 == 200 E + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_new_order_items_default_to_pending

failure.message:
AssertionError: New item should be pending, got: sent assert 'sent' == 'pending'
- pending + sent

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_send_kitchen_first_exit.py:313: in test_new_order_items_default_to_pending assert status == "pending", f"New item should be pending, got: {status}" E AssertionError: New item should be pending, got: sent E assert 'sent' == 'pending' E E - pending E + sent

testcase.name: test_get_table_orders_returns_all_orders
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_send_kitchen_first_exit.py:330: in test_get_table_orders_returns_all_orders assert orders_response.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
